page_title: Practical Operations Help for Small and Growing Businesses | Robotics Consulting
page_desc: Practical help for small and growing businesses to reduce manual work, simplify workflows, and connect systems. Based in Riga, available across Europe.
hero_title: Less Operational Chaos. Simpler Daily Work.
hero_lead: We help small and growing businesses reduce repetitive manual work, clean up day-to-day operational mess, and build practical systems that actually work.
hero_lead_mobile: We help businesses reduce manual work and simplify daily operations.
concept_auto_sub: From manual work to organised flow: fewer errors, less time wasted, more control.
kpi_2_sub: first working prototype to test the idea
kpi_3_sub: real results, not buzzwords or strategy slides
problem_body: Growing businesses often run into the same daily headaches:
problem_q1: Too much manual work and repetitive tasks
problem_q2: Everything tracked in WhatsApp, Excel, or paper
problem_q3: No visibility into what is actually happening
problem_q4: People constantly asking questions — no clear process
problem_note: We help fix this with practical tools and workflows — no complex strategy, no buzzwords.
services_sub: Practical services to reduce manual work, improve visibility, and simplify daily operations.
services_card_1_sub: Find the biggest time-wasters in your business and figure out what to fix first.
services_card_2_sub: Build something concrete and useful — before committing to a larger project.
services_card_3_sub: Connect your tools and systems so data flows where it needs to — automatically.
services_li_1: Internal tools and lightweight business systems
services_li_2: Automating orders, invoicing, and repetitive flows
services_li_3: Excel / CSV imports and data validation
services_li_4: Connecting your website to other business tools
services_li_5: Simple dashboards and better operational visibility
cta_mid_title: Want to find out what is worth fixing first?
why_sub_intro: Practical support focused on day-to-day results.
why_sub_1: We help bring order to operations, connect systems, and reduce unnecessary manual work.
why_sub_1_mobile: We help bring order to operations and reduce manual work.
why_sub_2: We focus on what actually helps your business day-to-day — not buzzwords, transformation roadmaps, or expensive strategies.
why_sub_3: From connecting your systems to building a simple internal tool that saves hours every week — we work at the level that makes sense for your business right now.
founder_sub: Hands-on experience across operational and enterprise environments:
founder_bg_3: WMS, ERP, and operational platform integrations
founder_bg_4: Cloud, edge, and real-time data pipelines
founder_bg_5: Team lead experience in multi-system architecture projects
why_honest: We may recommend NOT building something — if it will not actually save you time or money at this stage. Our goal is a result that genuinely helps your business, not a sale.
process_sub: A simple process from first conversation to something working.
process_sub_mobile: From first call to a working solution.
process_step_1: Get acquainted, clarify goals, and agree on the working format.
process_step_2: Understand your operations and main pain points on site.
process_step_3: Identify what will deliver the fastest and clearest impact.
process_step_4: Agree on a practical first step with clear scope, timeline, and expected outcome.
process_step_5: Implement the solution and support your team through rollout.
tech_sub: We work best with growing businesses where daily operations still feel manual, messy, or disconnected.
ideal_1: Small warehouses and local fulfilment operations
ideal_3: Light manufacturing, workshops, and production businesses
ideal_4: Growing service businesses with chaotic or manual processes
faq_sub: Common questions from small businesses considering their first steps with workflow tools or automation.
faq_q1: How much does this typically cost?
faq_a1: It depends on what needs doing — and we prefer to keep it transparent. Smaller operational reviews and lightweight tools can start from a few hundred euros. Larger integrations or automation projects vary. We will give you a clear scope and estimate before anything starts.
faq_q2: Do we need to have systems or vendors already selected?
faq_a2: No. We can help from scratch — whether that is picking the right tools, improving what you already have, or figuring out where to start. We are vendor-neutral and focused on what actually works for your situation.
faq_q3: Can you work with our existing systems and tools?
faq_a3: Yes. Most of the time the goal is to connect or improve what you already use — not replace everything. We specialise in integrations and practical improvements on top of existing infrastructure.
faq_q4: What if it turns out nothing needs to be built?
faq_a4: We will tell you. If a simple process change or a spreadsheet template solves your problem, we will say so. Our goal is a practical outcome that helps your business — not building things for the sake of it.
faq_q5: What kinds of businesses do you work with?
faq_a5: Mainly small and growing businesses — warehouses, logistics, local manufacturing, workshops, and service operations — where daily work still feels too manual or chaotic.
cta_sub: A short discovery call is enough to understand your situation and suggest a practical first step.
